subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend and companion of old! The Prison of 'Akká was as the palace of Chosroes and a sublime paradise, for that prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین و همدم قدیم زندان عکا ایوان کسری بود و جنت علیا زیرا آن سجن و
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @growth of the Cause, @poems and quotation from poetry
